mapper.update: UPDATE notification_request SET status = 'RESERVED', reserved_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE notification_request SET status = 'SENT', sent_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId} AND status = 'RESERVED'

UPDATE notification_request SET status = 'FAILED', retry_count = retry_count + 1, failed_at = NOW(), fail_reason = #{failReason}, next_retry_at = NOW() + (#{nextRetrySeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId} AND status = 'RESERVED' AND retry_count < #{maxRetryCount}
UPDATE notification_request SET status = 'PENDING', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId} AND status = 'FAILED' AND next_retry_at <= NOW() AND retry_count < 3
UPDATE notification_request SET status = 'DEAD', dead_at = NOW(), fail_reason = #{failReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId} AND status = 'FAILED' AND retry_count >= 3
UPDATE notification_request SET status = 'DEAD', dead_at = NOW(), fail_reason = #{failReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId} AND status = 'RESERVED'
UPDATE notification_request SET status = 'PENDING', reserved_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'RESERVED' AND reserved_at < NOW() - (#{timeoutMinutes} * INTERVAL '1 minute')
